fields.name: LPMS
fields.description: LPMS Low Power Mode Selection Selection of the low power mode entered when CPU enters DEEP SLEEP mode and BLE is rdy2sleep.

fields.name: ENSDNBOR
fields.description: ENSDNBOR: Enable BOR supply monitoring during shutdown mode.

fields.name: IBIAS_RUN_AUTO
fields.description: IBIAS_RUN_AUTO: Enable automatic IBIAS control during RUN/DEEPSTOP mode. 0: IBIAS control is manual (and controlled by IBIAS_RUN_STATE register) 1: IBIAS control is automatic (default).

fields.name: IBIAS_RUN_STATE
fields.description: IBIAS_RUN_STATE: Enable/Disable IBIAS during RUN mode when automatic mode is disabled. 0: IBIAS control is disabled (default). 1: IBIAS control is enabled.

fields.name: APC
fields.description: APC Apply Pull-up and pull-down configuration from CPU.

fields.name: ENBORH
fields.description: ENBORH: enable BORH configuration.

fields.name: SELBORH
fields.description: SELBORH[1:0]: BORH selection of Vbor threshold.

fields.name: ENBORL
fields.description: ENBORL: Enable BORL reset supervising during RUN mode. 0: No BORL is monitored during RUN mode. 1: BORL is monitored during RUN mode (a POR reset will happen if VDDIO goes below 1.6V during RUN mode) (default). Note: Enabling this feature prevents blocking the device if VDDIO goes below supported voltages during RUN.

fields.name: PVDE
fields.description: PVDE Programmable Voltage Detector Enable When this bit is set the Power Voltage Detector is enabled.

fields.name: PVDLS
fields.description: PVDLS[2:0] Programmable Voltage Detector Level selection then PVDO=1).

fields.name: DBGRET
fields.description: DBGRET: PA2 and PA3 retention enable after DEEPSTOP 0: PA2, PA3 don't retain their status exiting from DEEPSTOP. (default) 1: PA2, PA3 retain their status exiting from DEEPSTOP.

fields.name: RAMRET1
fields.description: Enables the RAM2 bank retention in DEEPSTOP mode.

fields.name: RAMRET2
fields.description: Enables the RAM2 bank retention in DEEPSTOP mode.

fields.name: RAMRET3
fields.description: Enables the RAM3 bank retention in DEEPSTOP mode.

fields.name: GPIORET
fields.description: GPIORET: GPIO retention enable. 0: GPIO don't retain their status during DEEPSTOP and exiting from DEEPSTOP (default) 1: GPIO retain their status during DEEPSTOP and exiting from DEEPSTOP. Note: it's mandatory to ensure this bit is set before entering DEEPSTOP unless DBRG.DEEPSTOP2 bit is set.

fields.name: ENTS
fields.description: ENTS: Enable Temperature Sensor.

fields.name: LSILPMUFEN
fields.description: LSI LPMU force enable.

fields.name: EWU0
fields.description: EWU0 Enable WakeUp line 0 (PB0) When this bit is set the wakeup line 0 is enabled and a rising or falling edge on wakeup line 0 will trigger a CPU wakeup event depending on CR4.WP0 bit.

fields.name: EWU1
fields.description: EWU1 Enable WakeUp line 1 (PB1) When this bit is set the wakeup line 1 is enabled and a rising or falling edge on wakeup line 1 will trigger a CPU wakeup event depending on CR4.WP1 bit.

fields.name: EWU2
fields.description: EWU2 Enable WakeUp line 2 (PB2) When this bit is set the wakeup line 2 is enabled and a rising or falling edge on wakeup line 2 will trigger a CPU wakeup event depending on CR4.WP2 bit.

fields.name: EWU3
fields.description: EWU3 Enable WakeUp line 3 (PB3) When this bit is set the wakeup line 3 is enabled and a rising or falling edge on wakeup line 3 will trigger a CPU wakeup event depending on CR4.WP3 bit.

fields.name: EWU4
fields.description: EWU4 Enable WakeUp line 4 (PB4) When this bit is set the wakeup line 4 is enabled and a rising or falling edge on wakeup line 4 will trigger a CPU wakeup event depending on CR4.WP4 bit.

fields.name: EWU5
fields.description: EWU5 Enable WakeUp line 5 (PB5) When this bit is set the wakeup line 5 is enabled and a rising or falling edge on wakeup line 5 will trigger a CPU wakeup event depending on CR4.WP5 bit.

fields.name: EWU6
fields.description: EWU6 Enable WakeUp line 6 (PB6) When this bit is set the wakeup line 6 is enabled and a rising or falling edge on wakeup line 6 will trigger a CPU wakeup event depending on CR4.WP6 bit.

fields.name: EWU7
fields.description: EWU7 Enable WakeUp line 7 (PB7) When this bit is set the wakeup line 7 is enabled and a rising or falling edge on wakeup line 7 will trigger a CPU wakeup event depending on CR4.WP7 bit.

fields.name: EWU8
fields.description: EWU8 Enable WakeUp line 8 (PA8) When this bit is set the wakeup line 8 is enabled and a rising or falling edge on wakeup line 8 will trigger a CPU wakeup event depending on CR4.WP8 bit.

fields.name: EWU9
fields.description: EWU9 Enable WakeUp line 9 (PA9) When this bit is set the wakeup line 9 is enabled and a rising or falling edge on wakeup line 9 will trigger a CPU wakeup event depending on CR4.WP9 bit.

fields.name: EWU10
fields.description: EWU10 Enable WakeUp line 10 (PA10) When this bit is set the wakeup line 10 is enabled and a rising or falling edge on wakeup line 10 will trigger a CPU wakeup event depending on CR4.WP10 bit.

fields.name: EWU11
fields.description: EWU11 Enable WakeUp line 11 (PA11) When this bit is set the wakeup line 11 is enabled and a rising or falling edge on wakeup line 11 will trigger a CPU wakeup event depending on CR4.WP11 bit.

fields.name: EWBLE
fields.description: EWBLE: Enable wakeup on BLE event. 0: Wakeup on BLE line is disabled (default). 1: Wakeup on BLE line is enabled.

fields.name: EWBLEHCPU
fields.description: EWBLEHCPU: Enable wakeup on BLE Host CPU event. 0: Wakeup on BLE Host CPU line is disabled (default). 1: Wakeup on BLE Host CPU line is enabled.

fields.name: EIWL2
fields.description: EIWL2: Enable wakeup on Internal event (LPUART). 0: Wakeup on internal line is disabled (default). 1: Wakeup on internal line is enabled.

fields.name: EIWL
fields.description: EIWL: Enable wakeup on Internal event (RTC). 0: Wakeup on internal line is disabled (default). 1: Wakeup on internal line is enabled.

fields.name: WUP0
fields.description: WUP0 Wake-up Line Polarity 0 (PB0) This bit defines the polarity used for event detection on external wake-up line 0.

fields.name: WUP1
fields.description: WUP1 Wake-up Line Polarity 1 (PB1) This bit defines the polarity used for event detection on external wake-up line 1.

fields.name: WUP2
fields.description: WUP2 Wake-up Line Polarity 2 (PB2) This bit defines the polarity used for event detection on external wake-up line 2.

fields.name: WUP3
fields.description: WUP3 Wake-up Line Polarity 3 (PB3) This bit defines the polarity used for event detection on external wake-up line 3.

fields.name: WUP4
fields.description: WUP4 Wake-up Line Polarity 4 (PB4) This bit defines the polarity used for event detection on external wake-up line 4.

fields.name: WUP5
fields.description: WUP5 Wake-up Line Polarity 5 (PB5) This bit defines the polarity used for event detection on external wake-up line 5.

fields.name: WUP6
fields.description: WUP6 Wake-up Line Polarity 6 (PB6) This bit defines the polarity used for event detection on external wake-up line 6.

fields.name: WUP7
fields.description: WUP7 Wake-up Line Polarity 7 (PB7) This bit defines the polarity used for event detection on external wake-up line 7.

fields.name: WUP8
fields.description: WUP8 Wake-up Line Polarity 8 (PA8) This bit defines the polarity used for event detection on external wake-up line 8.

fields.name: WUP9
fields.description: WUP9 Wake-up Line Polarity 9 (PA9) This bit defines the polarity used for event detection on external wake-up line 9.

fields.name: WUP10
fields.description: WUP10 Wake-up Line Polarity 10 (PA10) This bit defines the polarity used for event detection on external wake-up line 10.

fields.name: WUP11
fields.description: WUP11 Wake-up Line Polarity 11 (PA11) This bit defines the polarity used for event detection on external wake-up line 11.

fields.name: WUF0
fields.description: WUF0 WakeUp Flag 0 (PB0) This bit is set when a wakeup is detected on wakeup line 0. It is cleared by a reset pad or by writing 1 in this bit field. writting this bit, clears the interrupt:.

fields.name: WUF1
fields.description: WUF1 WakeUp Flag 1 (PB1) This bit is set when a wakeup is detected on wakeup line 1. It is cleared by a reset pad or by writing 1 in this bit field. writting this bit, clears the interrupt:.

fields.name: WUF2
fields.description: WUF2 WakeUp Flag 2 (PB2) This bit is set when a wakeup is detected on wakeup line 2. It is cleared by a reset pad or by writing 1 in this bit field. writting this bit, clears the interrupt:.

fields.name: WUF3
fields.description: WUF3 WakeUp Flag 3 (PB3) This bit is set when a wakeup is detected on wakeup line 3. It is cleared by a reset pad or by writing 1 in this bit field. writting this bit, clears the interrupt:.

fields.name: WUF4
fields.description: WUF4 WakeUp Flag 4 (PB4) This bit is set when a wakeup is detected on wakeup line 4. It is cleared by a reset pad or by writing 1 in this bit field. writting this bit, clears the interrupt:.

fields.name: WUF5
fields.description: WUF5 WakeUp Flag 5 (PB5) This bit is set when a wakeup is detected on wakeup line 5. It is cleared by a reset pad or by writing 1 in this bit field. writting this bit, clears the interrupt:.

fields.name: WUF6
fields.description: WUF6 WakeUp Flag 6 (PB6) This bit is set when a wakeup is detected on wakeup line 6. It is cleared by a reset pad or by writing 1 in this bit field. writting this bit, clears the interrupt:.

fields.name: WUF7
fields.description: WUF7 WakeUp Flag 7 (PB7) This bit is set when a wakeup is detected on wakeup line 7. It is cleared by a reset pad or by writing 1 in this bit field. writting this bit, clears the interrupt:.

fields.name: WUF8
fields.description: WUF8 WakeUp Flag 8 (PA8) This bit is set when a wakeup is detected on wakeup line 8. It is cleared by a reset pad or by writing 1 in this bit field. writting this bit, clears the interrupt:.

fields.name: WUF9
fields.description: WUF9 WakeUp Flag 9 (PA9) This bit is set when a wakeup is detected on wakeup line 9. It is cleared by a reset pad or by writing 1 in this bit field. writting this bit, clears the interrupt:.

fields.name: WUF10
fields.description: WUF10 WakeUp Flag 10 (PA10) This bit is set when a wakeup is detected on wakeup line 10. It is cleared by a reset pad or by writing 1 in this bit field. writting this bit, clears the interrupt:.

fields.name: WUF11
fields.description: WUF11 WakeUp Flag 11 (PA11) This bit is set when a wakeup is detected on wakeup line 11. It is cleared by a reset pad or by writing 1 in this bit field. writting this bit, clears the interrupt:.

fields.name: WBLEF
fields.description: WBLEF: BLE wakeup flag. 0: no wakeup from BLE occurred since last clear. 1: a wakeup from BLE occurred since last clear. Cleared by writing 1 in this bit.

fields.name: WBLEHCPUF
fields.description: WBLEHCPUF: BLE Host CPU wakeup flag. 0: no wakeup from BLE Host CPU occurred since last clear. 1: a wakeup from BLE Host CPU occurred since last clear. Cleared by writing 1 in this bit.

fields.name: IWUF2
fields.description: IWUF2: Internal wakeup 2 flag (LPUART). 0: no wakeup from LPUART occurred since last clear. 1: a wakeup from LPUART occurred since last clear. Note: The user must clear the LPUART wakeup flag inside the LPUART IP to clear this bit (mirror of the LPUART wakeup line on the PWRC block).

fields.name: IWUF
fields.description: IWUF: Internal wakeup flag (RTC). 0: no wakeup from RTC occurred since last clear. 1: a wakeup from RTC occurred since last clear. Note: The user must clear the RTC wakeup flag inside the RTC IP to clear this bit (mirror of the RTC wakeup line on the PWRC block).

fields.name: SMPSBYPR
fields.description: SMPSBYPR: SMPS Force Bypass Control Replica This bit mirrors the actual BYPASS_3V3 control signal driven to the SMPS regulator, dependant on the real working state.

fields.name: SMPSENR
fields.description: SMPSENR: SMPS Enable Control Replica This bit mirrors the actual ENABLE_3V3 control signal driven to the SMPS regulator, dependant on the real working state.

fields.name: SMPSRDY
fields.description: SMPSRDY: SMPS Ready Status This bit provides the information whether SMPS is ready.

fields.name: IOBOOTVAL2
fields.description: Bit3: PB15 input value on VDD33 latched at POR Bit2: PB14 input value on VDD33 latched at POR Bit1: PB13 input value on VDD33 latched at POR Bit0: PB12 input value on VDD33 latched at POR.

fields.name: REGLPS
fields.description: REGLPS: Regulator Low Power Started This bit provides the information whether low power regulator is ready.

fields.name: REGMS
fields.description: REGMS: Regulator Main LDO Started This bit provides the information whether main regulator is ready.

fields.name: PVDO
fields.description: PVDO: Power Voltage Detector Output When the Power Voltage Detector is enabled (CR2.PVDE) this bit is set when the system supply (VDDIO) is lower than the selected PVD threshold (CR2.PVDLS).

fields.name: IOBOOTVAL
fields.description: Bit3: PA11 input value on VDD33 latched at POR Bit2: PA10 input value on VDD33 latched at POR Bit1: PA9 input value on VDD33 latched at POR Bit0: PA8 input value on VDD33 latched at POR.

fields.name: SMPSLVL
fields.description: SMPSLVL[3:0] SMPS Output Level Voltage Selection Select the SMPS output voltage with a granularity of 50mV. Default = '0100' (1.4V) Vout = 1.2 + 0.05*SMPSOUT (V).

fields.name: SMPSBOMSEL
fields.description: SMPSBOMSEL: SMPS BOM Selection:.

fields.name: SMPSFRDY
fields.description: SMPSFB Force ready check When this bit is set, the SMPS FSM will consider the SMPS ready.

fields.name: SMPSLPOPEN
fields.description: SMPSLPOPEN: In Low Power mode SMPS is in OPEN mode (instead of PRECHARGE mode). When this bit is set, when the chip is in Low power mode the SMPS regulator will be disabled (HZ) Documentation needed.

fields.name: SMPSFBYP
fields.description: SMPSFB Force SMPS Regulator in bypass mode When this bit is set, the SMPS regulator will be forced to operate in precharge mode. the actual state of SMPS can be observed thanks to the replica SR2.SMPSBYPR.

fields.name: NOSMPS
fields.description: NOSMPS: No SMPS Mode When this bit is set, the SMPS regulator will be disabled. Note that this configuration should be used only when SMPS_FB pad is directly connected to VBATT or Vext, without L/C BOM.

fields.name: SMPS_ENA_DCM
fields.description: SMPS_ENA_DCM: enable discontinuous conduction mode.

fields.name: CLKDETR_DISABLE
fields.description: CLKDETR_DISABLE: disable SMPS clock detection The SMPS clock detection enables an automatic SMPS bypass switching in case of unwanted loss of SMPS clock.

fields.name: SMPS_PRECH_CUR_SEL
fields.description: SMPS_PRECH_CUR_SEL[1:0] Selection for SMPS PRECHARGE limit current.

fields.name: PUA
fields.description: PUA[x] : Pull Up Pull up activation on port A[i] pad when APC bit of PWRC CR3 is set.

fields.name: PDA
fields.description: PDA[x]: Pull Down Pull Down activation on port A[i] pad when APC bit of PWRC CR3 is set.

fields.name: PUB
fields.description: PUB[x] : Pull Up Pull up activation on port B[i] pad when APC bit of PWRC CR3 is set.

fields.name: PDB
fields.description: PDB[x]: Pull Down Pull Down activation on port B[i] pad when APC bit of PWRC CR3 is set.

fields.name: EWU12
fields.description: EWU12 Enable WakeUp line 12 (PA0) When this bit is set the wakeup line 12 is enabled and a rising or falling edge on wakeup line 0 will trigger a CPU wakeup event depending on CR7.WP0 bit.

fields.name: EWU13
fields.description: EWU13 Enable WakeUp line 13 (PA1) When this bit is set the wakeup line 13 is enabled and a rising or falling edge on wakeup line 1 will trigger a CPU wakeup event depending on CR7.WP1 bit.

fields.name: EWU14
fields.description: EWU14 Enable WakeUp line 14 (PA2) When this bit is set the wakeup line 14 is enabled and a rising or falling edge on wakeup line 2 will trigger a CPU wakeup event depending on CR7.WP2 bit.

fields.name: EWU15
fields.description: EWU15 Enable WakeUp line 15 (PA3) When this bit is set the wakeup line 15 is enabled and a rising or falling edge on wakeup line 3 will trigger a CPU wakeup event depending on CR7.WP3 bit.

fields.name: EWU16
fields.description: EWU16 Enable WakeUp line 16 (PB12) When this bit is set the wakeup line 16 is enabled and a rising or falling edge on wakeup line 4 will trigger a CPU wakeup event depending on CR7.WP4 bit.

fields.name: EWU17
fields.description: EWU17 Enable WakeUp line 17 (PB13) When this bit is set the wakeup line 17 is enabled and a rising or falling edge on wakeup line 5 will trigger a CPU wakeup event depending on CR7.WP5 bit.

fields.name: EWU18
fields.description: EWU18 Enable WakeUp line 18 (PB14) When this bit is set the wakeup line 18 is enabled and a rising or falling edge on wakeup line 6 will trigger a CPU wakeup event depending on CR7.WP6 bit.

fields.name: EWU19
fields.description: EWU19 Enable WakeUp line 19 (PB15) When this bit is set the wakeup line 19 is enabled and a rising or falling edge on wakeup line 7 will trigger a CPU wakeup event depending on CR7.WP7 bit.

fields.name: EWU20
fields.description: Enable wakeup on PB8 I/O event.

fields.name: EWU21
fields.description: Enable wakeup on PB9 I/O event.

fields.name: EWU22
fields.description: Enable wakeup on PB10 I/O event.

fields.name: EWU23
fields.description: Enable wakeup on PB11 I/O event.

fields.name: EWU24
fields.description: Enable wakeup on PA12 I/O event.

fields.name: EWU25
fields.description: Enable wakeup on PA13 I/O event.

fields.name: EWU26
fields.description: Enable wakeup on PA14 I/O event.

fields.name: EWU27
fields.description: Enable wakeup on PA15 I/O event.

fields.name: WUP12
fields.description: WUP12 Wake-up Line Polarity 12 (PA0) This bit defines the polarity used for event detection on external wake-up line 12.

fields.name: WUP13
fields.description: WUP13 Wake-up Line Polarity 13 (PA1) This bit defines the polarity used for event detection on external wake-up line 13.

fields.name: WUP14
fields.description: WUP14 Wake-up Line Polarity 14 (PA2) This bit defines the polarity used for event detection on external wake-up line 14.

fields.name: WUP15
fields.description: WUP15 Wake-up Line Polarity 15 (PA3) This bit defines the polarity used for event detection on external wake-up line 15.

fields.name: WUP16
fields.description: WUP16 Wake-up Line Polarity 16 (PB12) This bit defines the polarity used for event detection on external wake-up line 16.

fields.name: WUP17
fields.description: WUP17 Wake-up Line Polarity 17 (PB13) This bit defines the polarity used for event detection on external wake-up line 17.

fields.name: WUP18
fields.description: WUP18 Wake-up Line Polarity 18 (PB14) This bit defines the polarity used for event detection on external wake-up line 18.

fields.name: WUP19
fields.description: WUP19 Wake-up Line Polarity 19 (PB15) This bit defines the polarity used for event detection on external wake-up line 19.

fields.name: WUP20
fields.description: Wake-up polarity for PB8 IO event.

fields.name: WUP21
fields.description: Wake-up polarity for PB9 IO event.

fields.name: WUP22
fields.description: Wake-up polarity for PB10 IO event.

fields.name: WUP23
fields.description: Wake-up polarity for PB11 IO event.

fields.description: Wake-up polarity for PB13 IO event.

fields.name: WUP26
fields.description: Wake-up polarity for PB14 IO event.

fields.name: WUP27
fields.description: Wake-up polarity for PB15 IO event.

fields.name: WUF12
fields.description: WUF12 WakeUp Flag 12 PA0 This bit is set when a wakeup is detected on wakeup line 12. It is cleared by a reset pad or by writing 1 in this bit field. writting this bit, clears the interrupt:.

fields.name: WUF13
fields.description: WUF13 WakeUp Flag 13 PA1 This bit is set when a wakeup is detected on wakeup line 13. It is cleared by a reset pad or by writing 1 in this bit field. writting this bit, clears the interrupt:.

fields.name: WUF14
fields.description: WUF14 WakeUp Flag 14 PA2 This bit is set when a wakeup is detected on wakeup line 14. It is cleared by a reset pad or by writing 1 in this bit field. writting this bit, clears the interrupt:.

fields.description: WUF15 WakeUp Flag 15 PA3 This bit is set when a wakeup is detected on wakeup line 15. It is cleared by a reset pad or by writing 1 in this bit field. writting this bit, clears the interrupt:.

fields.description: WUF16 WakeUp Flag 16 PB12 This bit is set when a wakeup is detected on wakeup line 16. It is cleared by a reset pad or by writing 1 in this bit field. writting this bit, clears the interrupt:.

fields.description: WUF17 WakeUp Flag 17 PB13 This bit is set when a wakeup is detected on wakeup line 17. It is cleared by a reset pad or by writing 1 in this bit field. writting this bit, clears the interrupt:.

fields.description: WUF18 WakeUp Flag 18 PB14 This bit is set when a wakeup is detected on wakeup line 18. It is cleared by a reset pad or by writing 1 in this bit field. writting this bit, clears the interrupt:.

fields.description: WUF19 WakeUp Flag 19 PB15 This bit is set when a wakeup is detected on wakeup line 19. It is cleared by a reset pad or by writing 1 in this bit field. writting this bit, clears the interrupt:.

fields.name: WUF20
fields.description: PB8 I/O wake-up flag.

fields.name: WUF21
fields.description: PB9 I/O wake-up flag.

fields.name: WUF22
fields.description: PB10 I/O wake-up flag.

fields.name: WUF23
fields.description: PB11 I/O wake-up flag.

fields.name: IOCFG0
fields.description: Drive configuration for PA8.

fields.name: IOCFG1
fields.description: Drive configuration for PA9.

fields.name: IOCFG2
fields.description: Drive configuration for PA10.

fields.name: IOCFG3
fields.description: Drive configuration for PA11.

fields.name: IOCFG4
fields.description: Drive configuration for PA4.

fields.description: Drive configuration for PA5.

fields.name: IOCFG6
fields.description: Drive configuration for PA6.

fields.name: IOCFG7
fields.description: Drive configuration for PA7.

fields.name: DEEPSTOP2
fields.description: DEEPSTOP2: DEEPSTOP2 low power saving emulation enable. 0: normal DEEPSTOP will be applied 1: DEEPSTOP2 (debugger features not lost) will be applied instead of DEEPSTOP.

fields.name: DIS_PRECH
fields.description: DIS_PRECH[2:0]: disable precharge during deepstop (debug) - 111: precharge and SMPS monitoring are disabled (whatever CR5.SMPSLPOPEN) - 101: precharge are activated only at deepstop exit (to be used only with CR5.SMPSLPOPEN=1) - else: No effect (default 0x0).

fields.name: DEEPSTOPF
fields.description: DEEPSTOPF System DeepStop Flag This bit is set by hardware and cleared only by a POR reset or by writing '1' in this bit field.

fields.name: RFPHASEF
fields.description: RFPHASEF RFPHASE Flag This bit is set by hardware after a Radio wake-up event (BLE activation); it is cleared either by software, writing '1' in this bit field, or by hardware when Ready2Sleep signal is asserted by the Radio IP.

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: the PUCRx and PDCRx are not used to control the I/O pull-up and pull-down configuration of the product I/Os.

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: the I/O pull-up and pull-down configurations defined in the PUCRx and PDCRx registers is applied.

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: System has not been in DEEPSTOP mode.

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: System has been in DEEPSTOP mode.

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: BORH off (VBOR0): threshold level for above 1.60V voltage operation.

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: BORH is enabled, threshold level depends on SELBOR[1:0].

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: the PD_ALL_SHUTDOWN signal is set during SHUTDOWN mode.

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: the PD_ALL_SHUTDOWN signal is not set during SHUTDOWN mode.

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: Pull-Down not activated on Port A[i].

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: Pull-Down activated on Port A[i] when APC bit of PWRC CR3 bit is set.

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: Pull-Down not activated on Port B[i].

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: Pull-Down activated on Port B[i] when APC bit of PWRC CR3 bit is set.

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: Pull-Up not activated on port A[i].

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: Pull-Up activated on port A[i] when APC bit of PWRC CR3 bit is set and PWR_PDCRA[x] is reset.

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: Pull-Up not activated on port B[i].

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: Pull-Up activated on port B[i] when APC bit of PWRC CR3 bit is set and PWR_PDCRB[x] is reset.

variants.name: B_0x7
variants.description: External input analog voltage (compare internally to VBGP; When external input <VBGP.

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: RF IP does not require attention.

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: RF IP awake and requesting system attention.

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: BORH Level 1 (VBOR1): threshold level for above 2.0V voltage operation.

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: BORH Level 2 (VBOR2): threshold level for above 2.21 V voltage operation.

variants.name: B_0x2
variants.description: BORH Level 3 (VBOR3): threshold level for above 2.52 V voltage operation.

variants.name: B_0x3
variants.description: BORH Level 4(VBOR4): threshold level for above 2.81 V voltage operation.

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: SMPS is disabled and bypassed (ENABLE_3V3=0 and PRECHARGE_3V3=1).

variants.name: B_0x0
variants.description: in Low Power mode, SMPS is in PRECHARGE, output is connected to VDDIO.

variants.name: B_0x1
variants.description: in Low Power mode, SMPS is disabled, output is floating.
